title: Add OSC 8 hyperlink support to terminal renderer
description: OSC 8 escape: ESC]8;;URL BEL text ESC]8;; BEL. Need to: 1) add url: Option<String> to StyledSpan, 2) emit OSC 8 open/close in write_to/write_to_width when url is Some, 3) handle Tag::Link in highlight/markdown.rs to extract URL and set on inner spans. Supported by iTerm2, kitty, wezterm, ghostty. Ignored by others. Design: ai/design/chat-rendering-enhancements.md
